name: Terminal Green
description: True-black backdrop with phosphor-green accent and JetBrains Mono everywhere. Matrix / hacker / 80s terminal vibe — best for technical demos and CLI walkthroughs.
descriptionZh: 纯黑底 + 磷光绿强调色, 全程等宽字体. Matrix 黑客 / 80 年代终端感, 最适合技术演示与 CLI 教程.
motionHints: 打字机逐字、命令行 prompt 闪烁、扫描线、磷光残影；终端味、精确、低快感。**禁**柔光、衬线字体、温暖滤镜
